query:
SELECT 
  id,
  title,
  category,
  tags,
  LENGTH(content) as content_length,
  CASE 
    WHEN embedding IS NOT NULL AND embedding != '' THEN 'Yes'
    ELSE 'No'
  END as has_embedding,
  createdAt
FROM knowledge
WHERE category = 'system_knowledge'
ORDER BY id DESC;
